coreJobStatement: Enable controlled, safe, and weathertight passage through building openings in industrial, commercial, and residential structures while meeting fire resistance, thermal separation, acoustic attenuation, security, and structural loading code requirements
hierarchy: Process VN (L7 through L4) — building envelope and controlled access manufacturing chain
marketSize: ~$36.3B global industrial door systems (2025); industrial sectional segment ~$2.1B EU; industrial sliding door ~$5B (2025), CAGR 7% through 2033

l6Systems.name: Raw Material Intake & Prep
l6Systems.jobFamily: Receive and pre-process metal feedstock (coil, billets, purchased profiles) to manufacturing-ready state

l6Systems.name: Structural Profile & Frame Forming
l6Systems.jobFamily: Form load-bearing frame sections, guide rails, and sliding tracks into required cross-section geometry

l6Systems.name: Door Leaf Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble door panel body from face skins, insulation core, and internal stiffeners

l6Systems.name: Hardware & Drive Component Production
l6Systems.jobFamily: Produce or source rollers, hinges, locking systems, springs, and drive mechanisms enabling door motion and retention

l6Systems.name: Surface Treatment & Finishing
l6Systems.jobFamily: Apply corrosion protection, fire-resistant treatment, and decorative coating to frames and panels

l6Systems.name: Assembly & Systems Integration
l6Systems.jobFamily: Integrate frame, door leaf, hardware, seals, glazing, and automation into complete tested door unit

l6Systems.name: Compliance Testing & Certification
l6Systems.jobFamily: Verify fire resistance class, thermal transmittance (Uw), acoustic rating (Rw), and structural loading against EN/NFPA standards

l6Systems.name: Quality Assurance (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain dimensional, surface, and performance conformance at all process gates

vnUnits.name: Precision Steel Track & Guide Profile
vnUnits.functionalJob: ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION. Cold-drawn/cold-rolled specialty profiles (~25%) for guide rails with roller guidance groove + sealing lip at IT8 tolerance, optional induction hardening. Alternatives: In-house roll-formed sections (~40%), Hot-rolled structural sections (~25%), Extruded aluminum (~10%, not ZOLLERN - C6).
vnUnits.description: Custom cold-drawn alloy steel guide rail profiles with asymmetric cross-section, roller guidance groove, sealing lip

vnUnits.name: Roll Forming Line
vnUnits.functionalJob: Continuous in-line roll former (~65%, Dahlstrom, Metform, Bradbury). Flexible/quick-change (~20%). CNC servo (~15%).

vnUnits.name: Steel Strip & Coil
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hot-dip galvanized coil (~55%), pre-painted coil (~30%), cold-rolled bare coil (~15%).

zollernPosition: ZOLLERN holds PRIMARY position at L5 Precision Steel Track & Guide Profile under L6b Structural Profile & Frame Forming. Supplies guide rail cross-sections for industrial sliding, fire-rated, security, and automated high-speed door systems.
strategicPosition: Against volume-viable incumbents (roll forming + hot-rolled), ZOLLERN net weighted delta is +83. Key differentiators: surface hardness for rated cycle count (N04, delta +3), fire door seal groove precision (N19, delta +1), EN 10204 3.1 material certificates (N21, delta +3).
